checkin.journal:
Been super interesting day, but I was relaxed and even though things didn't go my way I was more relaxed and didnt care
Woke up in new morning  in sunny Croatia
Gym time - did some balancing exercises
Swimming - swam 2 lenghts was veery nice

Drive back home was long as there was tons of traffic 4 hours almost
Shopping in Mueler and spar
We ate in Slovenska hisa
Shopping in Mueler
We unpacked everything - took some time but we did it
My mental health was good, my fizio was good
In
